title: verbascum vulcanicum var. vulcanicum
intro: Verbascum vulcanicum var. vulcanicum, also known as Vulcan's Spur or Vulcan's Mule Ears, is a variety of flowering plant within the genus Verbascum. It is a biennial herb native to Europe, characterized by its distinctive yellow flowers with a reddish-brown center. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Verbascum vulcanicum var. vulcanicum include soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and supporting digestive health, with herbal preparations like infusions, tinctures, and decoctions commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
